resourceTemplates.name: eulerpool-earning-calls-list
resourceTemplates.title: Eulerpool earning call transcripts by ticker
resourceTemplates.description: Returns a list of earning call transcript summaries for a company ticker symbol. Includes transcript ID, publication date, title and available media links.

resourceTemplates.name: eulerpool-earning-call-transcript
resourceTemplates.title: Eulerpool earning call transcript
resourceTemplates.description: Returns the full earning call transcript content identified by its transcript ID, including participants and parsed dialogue entries.
